reviews.comment:
Los chicos de la playa excelente...fui a tomar un café ...un asco la atención ...le doy 3 x la atención de playero ....

(Translated by Google)
The guys on the beach were great... I went for a coffee... the service was awful... I'd give it 3 stars for the beach attendant service....

reviews.comment:
Poco se puede decir del servicio excelente que brindan las estaciones de servicios del ACA. Como punto distintivo pero a la vez homogéneo, en el shop hacen un café muy rico. El tradicional "cortado en jarro" te lo proveen en tazas del tamaño de café con leche. Pero lejos de parecer aguado o insulso, por el contrario, despierta tus sentidos y te hace disfrutar del momento. Sigan así!

(Translated by Google)
Little can be said about the excellent service provided by ACA service stations. A distinctive yet consistent feature is their delicious coffee shop. The traditional "cortado en jarro" is served in cups the size of a regular café con leche. But far from being weak or bland, it awakens your senses and makes you savor the moment. Keep it up!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ZzdyUTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Me gusta que tengan una máquina de aire gratuita y que la reparen constantemente, a diferencia de otras estaciones.

(Translated by Google)
I like that they have a free air conditioning unit and that they constantly repair it, unlike other stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cWNUa1VREAE

reviews.comment:
Se demoran bastante en atenderte aunque haya poca demanda

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve you even when there is little demand

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, trabajan con la app de ypf, medios de pago y variedad en el drugstore, a los baños les falta limpieza. Lugares adaptados para sillas de rueda. Bien iluminado y tiene para poner aire a las ruedas. Es un lugar seguro para el que anda de noche y de referencia en caso de haberse perdido.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they accept the YPF app, offer various payment methods, and have a good selection in the drugstore. The restrooms need cleaning. There are wheelchair-accessible areas. It's well-lit and has a tire inflator. It's a safe place for those walking at night and a good landmark if you get lost.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OXBQOVJBEAE

reviews.comment: Great place, it's a place where the air for your tires is not charged! Very good service
